'''Magentic''' was a city on [[Hanoon]].

==History==
Magentic was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]-controlled [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] called [[Hanoon]]. Comprising a [[Command center]], [[prefab shelter]]s, and an [[animal nursery]], the city sat next to one of the world's [[Water/Legends|canals]].<ref name="SW:GB" /> By [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Battle of Hanoon]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref> the city had been constructed and an Imperial [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] had been placed in the city to cement Imperial control. The inhabitants kept a shard of the [[Vor'Na'Tu]], an ancient [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]], as a relic. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the future founder of the [[New Jedi Order]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], along with his sister [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Army/Legends|army]], [[Battle of Hanoon|ventured to Hanoon]] to recover the Vor'Na'Tu shards. They made their way to Magentic, and the town agreed to turn over the shards if the fortress was destroyed. The New Republic attacked the fortress and knocked it out.<ref name="SW:GB" />

Magentic gratefully gave up their shard. Later, Organa and Skywalker decided to free the rest of the asteroid and took control of the [[Terraform Processor]]. With the demise of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Yittreas]], Hanoon agreed to join the New Republic.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Magentic was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] to the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It appeared during a [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia campaign mission, and the player must free the town as part of the mission. The mission and thus Magentic was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
